name: PAY_AMER_INTERFACE_PARAMETERS
description: This table contains the file version and parameter details of various North America processes.

columns.Name: INTERFACE_PARAM_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Key to identify a record

columns.Name: CONTENT_PROVIDER
columns.Comments: Data Source Provider

columns.Name: VERSION_LOADED
columns.Comments: Version of file last loaded by the process

columns.Name: CONTENT_FILE_LOCATION
columns.Comments: Location of file last used by the process

columns.Name: CONTENT_FILE_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the file last used by the process

columns.Name: UPLOADED_OLDER_VERSION
columns.Comments: Flag to indicate if the process uploaded previous or older version of file

columns.Name: PROCESS_NAME
columns.Comments: Unique Name to identify the process

columns.Name: COUNTRY_CODE
columns.Comments: Country Code

columns.Name: PROCESS_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Identifies the date when the process has last loaded the latest version of file

columns.Name: CONTEXT_VALUE1
columns.Comments: CONTEXT_VALUE1

columns.Name: CONTEXT_VALUE2
columns.Comments: CONTEXT_VALUE2

columns.Name: CONTEXT_VALUE3
columns.Comments: CONTEXT_VALUE3

columns.Name: CONTEXT_VALUE4
columns.Comments: CONTEXT_VALUE4

columns.Name: CONTEXT_VALUE5
columns.Comments: CONTEXT_VALUE5

columns.Name: CONTEXT_VALUE6
columns.Comments: CONTEXT_VALUE6

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_NAME
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_PACKAGE
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the package name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES.
